title: Lellingeria micropecten
taxonomy: Lellingeria micropecten is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a member of the genus Lellingeria, which is a group of epiphytic and terrestrial ferns. The genus Lellingeria is part of the family Polypodiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of ferns. This classification places Lellingeria micropecten within the larger group of leptosporangiate ferns. The classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics of the plant.
